L=v:sub(m+-0.04*-25,m+12372001%386625)local t=v:sub(m+7669426%((((-617.4*50+22441399)%682967+23279618)-(-251738))%941565),m+(218956+-218954))local i=v:sub(m+16751595%507624,m+3%193633)if not N or not y=V(e*(4905%4901)+math.floor(K/((-3635.75*164+13668449)%871478)),H)table.insert(R,string.char(y))if t~=`=`then local m=V((K%(1131064%94254))*(804406+-804390)+math.floor(P/(.0054421768707483*((-798671+4361370)%(1106.2*((14524610-482750)%702086))))),H)table.insert(R,string.char(m))end if i~=`=`then local m=V((P%(3747721%416413))*(13919284%994230)+l,H)table.insert(R,string.char(m))end end N[m]=table.concat(R)end end end return(function(m,H,V,v,R,L,t,K,a,j,G,M,c,i,D,l,y,e,X,P,C,F,N)C,y,N,a,j,D,K,l,c,M,e,i,P,F,X,G=function(m,o)local H=l(o)local V=function(V)return N(m,{V},o,H)end return V end,function(m)local N,H=o((-551518-352164)+892548),m[o((-921039+582390)+327515)]while H do e[H],N=e[H]-o(-44546-(((6460603%1018534+-1395598)+216443)-(-796344))),o(-282015+270881)+N if o(392160+(-869205-(289877+-755827)))==e[H]then e[H],i[H]=nil,nil end H=m[N]end end,function(N,V,v,R)local yX={}local end,function(m,o)local H=l(o)local V=function(V,v,R)return N(m,{V;v,R},o,H)end return V end,function()P=P+o(-931130+919996)e[P]=o(607843-(32645770-(-217412))%871465)return P end,function(m)for N=o(853764+-864898),#m,o(43.4921875*-256)do e[m[N]]=o(-928687-(437504+-1355057))+e[m[N]]end if V then local N=V(o(-108158-(-97564)))local N(m,{...},o,H)end return V end,function(m)e[m]=e[m]-o(-208126-(-196992))if o(663808+-674903)==e[m]then e[m],i[m]=nil,nil end end,{},{},o(-219899+208804),function(m,o)local H=l(o)local V=function(V,v,R,L,t)return N(m,{V,v,R,L,t},o,H)end return V end,function(m,o)local H=l(o)local V=function(V,v,R,L,t,i)return N(m,{V,v;R;L,t;i},o,H)end return V end,function(m,H)local V=l(H)local v=function()return N(m,{},H,V)end return v end return(c(o(-989436+979291),{}))(H(t))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[o(139864-150191)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
